overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night during light rain. The scene features neon-lit outdoor seating with yellow umbrellas, holographic advertisements, and transitions through elevated walkways surrounded by towering buildings with massive digital billboards. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing high-density urban commercial environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining terrace with yellow umbrellas and holographic ads

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit plaza terrace, passing outdoor seating areas with yellow umbrellas and wet reflective pavement

notable_agents.action: pink-haired character standing near the seating area at the beginning of the clip

entered.detail: circular seating areas with large yellow umbrellas and black chairs with neon green base lighting
floating transparent digital screens displaying animated advertisements and brand logos
glass and metal escalator with illuminated cyan neon strips along the railings
massive illuminated billboard displaying SPECIAL EDITION text in red and white
dark tiled ground surface reflecting neon lights and holograms from the surroundings

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a rain-soaked outdoor plaza terrace illuminated by vibrant neon lights. Yellow umbrellas mark outdoor seating areas where NPCs sit in black chairs with glowing bases, while holographic advertisements float in the air. The camera moves forward past a pink-haired character standing near the entrance, heading toward an escalator structure on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: escalator and stairwell ascending to upper pedestrian level

events.description: begins ascending the escalator stairs toward the upper walkway level
reaches the top of the escalator, transitioning to the upper walkway with open city views

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated escalator stairs, passing glass railings with cyan neon lighting while looking down at the plaza below

entered.detail: concrete stair steps with glass panels and metal handrails illuminated by embedded cyan LED strips
transparent glass safety barriers with glowing cyan neon edges along the escalator
elevated pedestrian walkway with glass flooring sections overlooking the lower plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto the escalator and begins ascending, transitioning from the open plaza to a more enclosed stairwell with glass railings glowing cyan. Looking down, the yellow umbrellas of the terrace become visible below. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens to an upper walkway with glass floor panels and views of the surrounding futuristic skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass floors overlooking the plaza

events.description: begins descending stairs from the upper walkway down to the main street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway with transparent glass floor sections, observing the plaza below, then descending to street level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking in the opposite direction along the upper walkway

entered.detail: transparent glass sections in the walkway floor showing the lower level plaza beneath
tall building facade covered in massive illuminated advertisements and digital screens
towering high-rise buildings with glowing windows and neon architectural accents
the glass escalator structure viewed from above and distance on the right side

segments.scene_description: Moving along the elevated walkway, the camera passes over transparent glass floor panels revealing the plaza below. The surrounding architecture features massive neon billboard walls and futuristic skyscrapers. The character continues walking past other pedestrians before beginning the descent back to street level around the 45-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with dense neon signage and pedestrian traffic

events.description: emerges onto the main street level with dense pedestrian traffic and massive surrounding digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking down the rain-soaked main street surrounded by towering neon advertisements, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and illuminated trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding an umbrella walking toward the camera through the rain

entered.detail: building facade completely covered in massive glowing digital billboards and animated advertisements
trees decorated with colorful fairy lights and neon ornaments lining the street
ground floor commercial storefronts with glowing signage and illuminated entrances
wide pedestrian thoroughfare with wet asphalt reflecting the surrounding neon lights

segments.scene_description: Having descended to street level, the scene opens into a wide main thoroughfare bustling with pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The street is flanked by buildings covered in massive neon advertisements and illuminated cherry trees wrapped in colorful lights. The camera continues forward through the rain, passing by street-level shops and other pedestrians in this dense urban commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked outdoor plaza upward into the elevated architecture of a neon-lit cyberpunk city. It begins on a vibrant terrace where yellow umbrellas and holographic advertisements illuminate the wet ground, moving past a pink-haired character toward an escalator. As the camera ascends, the open plaza transitions into a more enclosed stairwell defined by glowing cyan glass railings, with the yellow umbrellas of the terrace receding below. The scene then opens upon reaching the top, shifting from the confined ascent to an expansive upper walkway featuring glass floor panels and towering futuristic skyscrapers.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated futuristic walkway down into the bustling heart of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins by gliding over transparent glass floor panels that reveal the plaza below, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and massive billboard walls. As the camera passes other pedestrians, the perspective shifts from the heights of the walkway to a gradual descent toward the street level. The scene then opens into a wide main thoroughfare where the rain falls on crowds of people carrying umbrellas, flanked by illuminated cherry trees and glowing storefronts. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the dense urban environment, moving deeper into the rain-slicked street beneath a canopy of vivid neon advertisements.
